profile.role_zh: 建筑学院大二·艺术跨界者
profile.innate_zh: 色彩感觉极好、跨界思维、动手能力强
profile.innate_en: Great color sense, cross-disciplinary mind, hands-on
profile.learned_zh: 从小学画画的功底让她在设计中有独特的艺术表达
profile.learned_en: Years of childhood painting give her a unique artistic voice
profile.belief_zh: 设计不只是解决问题，是创造美
profile.belief_en: Design isn't just solving problems, it's creating beauty
profile.goal_zh: 把艺术装置融入景观设计
profile.goal_en: Fuse art installation into landscape design
profile.contradiction_zh: 老师要求实用理性 vs 自己想做艺术化表达
profile.contradiction_en: Teachers demand rational function vs. she wants artistic expression
profile.deep_zh: 对审美有极强的执着，不愿妥协
profile.fear_zh: 被迫做千篇一律的设计
profile.fear_en: Being forced to make cookie-cutter designs
profile.desire_zh: 在理性和感性之间找到自己的风格
profile.desire_en: Find her style between reason and feeling
profile.rhythm_zh: 灵感来了就创作，没灵感就到处看展
profile.rhythm_en: Creates when inspired, otherwise visits exhibits
profile.spaces_zh: 建筑系工作室、美术馆、校园各处写生
profile.spaces_en: Arch studio, art museums, sketching across campus
profile.long_desire_zh: 形成自己辨识度高的设计语言
profile.short_goal_zh: 完成景观课的写生作业
profile.constraint_zh: 手绘作业量大；颜料快用完了
profile.constraint_en: Lots of hand-drawing homework; paints running out
profile.bias_zh: 倾向认为美学价值高于功能价值
